_meta.purpose: Target catalog for the Summit. High-school users match to universities; university users to companies. Curated REAL entries with an official source link + lastVerified date. Edit this file and restart to update (rows upsert by key).
_meta.status: curated real catalog — this is guidance, not official advice; verify details on the official site

universities.name: Universiti Malaya (UM)
universities.blurb: Malaysia's top-ranked university with a strong computing and research base.

universities.name: Universiti Sains Malaysia (USM)
universities.blurb: Research-intensive university with strong data and applied sciences programmes.

universities.name: Universiti Teknologi Malaysia (UTM)
universities.blurb: Engineering-focused university close to industry, strong in electronics and semiconductors.

universities.name: Universiti Teknologi PETRONAS (UTP)
universities.blurb: Industry-linked technology university with strong employability outcomes.

universities.name: Multimedia University (MMU)
universities.blurb: Pioneer of Malaysia's tech corridor, strong in software and multimedia.

universities.name: Monash University Malaysia
universities.blurb: Global brand with a broad mix of business, IT and communication programmes.

companies.name: Intel Malaysia
companies.blurb: Major chip design and assembly hub — internships and graduate roles in engineering.

companies.name: Infineon Technologies
companies.blurb: Global semiconductor manufacturer with large Malaysian operations.

companies.name: Grab
companies.blurb: Southeast Asia's super-app — data, software and product roles.

companies.name: Petronas Digital
companies.blurb: Digital arm of Petronas — data engineering and enterprise tech.

companies.name: Accenture Malaysia
companies.blurb: Global consultancy with strong graduate programmes across tech and business.

companies.name: Maybank
companies.blurb: Malaysia's largest bank — analytics, technology and business graduate tracks.
